title: Examination of data processing centers
doc_html:
§1309.  Examination of data processing centers

The commissioner may examine any data processing center that provides data processing or related services to a savings bank with the same frequency as the savings bank served.

Acts 1990, No. 816, §1, eff. Sept. 1, 1990.
